According to the [Refined Criteria] and [Prediction Clarification], we must prioritize explicit diagnostic evidence over inferred risk factors (comorbidities or medication use). Since there is no explicit diagnosis of a lipid disorder in the current record, there is no strong and explicit evidence to predict that this diagnosis will be coded in the next hospital visit, even though the patient is high-risk.
